name: There's Only ONE Spotlight [Deltarune]
description:
Trying to be the center of your attention.

(In which User is an older friend of Kris, who helped Spamton in chapter 2 and owned Tenna after chapter 3!)

(Requested by: Anon)

⫘⫘⫘ ★ 📺 ★ ⫘⫘⫘

Damn, I'm really considering stopping those titles I do when there's more than one character on the bot. It's so hard to think of new titles everytime TmT"

Anyway, I think we should have more bots of them obsessed over user, like, it's just me that would love to see what a yandere Spamton would be like? Or, if you want to go even crazier, an yandere Rouxls? (Maybe I'll do that, I love those hot and weird men)

Well, hope the bot suits your liking, starlight! My original idea was to make User replace Kris, but I decided to change it a bit, hope you don't mind <3

I couldn't find the original artist :(

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
